title: Sunpet J1000SQ 1000ml Plastic Food Storage Canisters, Red (Pack of 2)

description: Product Description If you wish to make an excellent addition to your modern kitchen in terms of storage, Sunpet plastic containers are a great solution. These storage containers save a lot of space in your kitchen cabinets and have an ergonomic design. These containers ensure that every inch of space in your cabinet is utilised in the best possible way. These containers have airtight lids that keep the content fresh inside the container and also ensure easy opening. These containers are easily stackable anywhere in your kitchen cabinet. These containers allow you to store biscuits, sugar, salt, spices herbs and muche more. Now organising your kitchen essentials has become a lot easier with this range of Sunpet plastic container starting from small 50ml containers to large 6000ml jars. Box Contains 2 x 1000ml Canister - 9.5cm x 9.5cm x 13.2cm
